summary: Lead accepts M7-DECISION-INSPECTOR-REWRITE-001 for PR integration after client_engineer implementation, gameplay REQUEST_CHANGES/R2 ACCEPT, test_engineer ACCEPT, and independent QA ACCEPT. The right inspector now starts from current problem, recommendation, cost, benefit, risk, next action, and localized reasons before grouped district data; R2 fixed blocked-route disabled-action guidance and removed player-facing read-model jargon.

tests_run.result: PASS; existing Vite chunk-size warning only.

decisions.decision: Accept the task after gameplay R2 ACCEPT, test ACCEPT, and QA ACCEPT.
This acceptance does not approve formal M7 content lock, M7 exit, final art, release readiness, manual node battle, telemetry, server, cloud-save, commercial, or branding scope.
Continue UX recovery after integration; task rail and UX recovery validation remain separate downstream tasks.

risks.summary: Blocked-route guidance remains text-level selection help, not a full route repair tutorial.
risks.mitigation: Acceptable for this task; UX smoke/player feedback can revisit if confusion persists.

risks.summary: Future reason sources still need explicit player-facing i18n keys to avoid fallback raw-ish text.
risks.mitigation: Carry into subsequent UI tasks and raw-key assertions.

requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close the task only after origin/main contains the accepted changes.
